hypothesis: Conditioning CompGen’s latent diffusion model on explicit active-site motif labels and per-site adsorbate–first-shell radial distances will, after fine-tuning on the same HEA dataset, reduce the Fréchet Distance of generated versus real latent embeddings on the HEA test set by ≥20% and reduce compositional Leakage by ≥25% compared to the original CompGen conditioned only on adsorbate identity, adsorption energy, and element list.
